name: Sport Integrity Australia - Decision Making in Sport

reviews.review_title: Unusual app but very well done
reviews.review_description:
This is an app about the difficulty of sport cheating. It is an interactive app where you select a choice out 3 hard decisions. I was surprised but the quality of the app. It is very well done and the voices are great. I truly enjoyed this experience, but I think lots of people will miss it as they are probably more into games.

I cannot wait to find out what new app will come out from the experience of this app. Personally I enjoy learning and anything that teach is awesome. Good luck.
